title: Content Script — Amazon Scraper (URL ASIN → JSON-LD → DOM)
description: Implement entrypoints/content.ts. Product extraction priority order: (1) URL ASIN detection via /dp/ and /gp/product/ patterns, (2) JSON-LD Schema.org parsing, (3) conservative DOM fallback selectors. Extracted payload: { asin, title, price, rating, reviewCount, jsonLd, url }. No auto-scraping — extraction fires only on EXECUTE_SCRAPER message from background SW. Inject Scout Result panel into page DOM via Shadow DOM (CSP-safe). Unit tests for each extraction strategy with mock HTML fixtures (TDD).
